"D:\Software\IntelliJ CLion 2020.2.4\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Swap.dir/objects.a
D:\Mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\Swap.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Swap.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Swap.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o Swap.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSwap.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Swap.dir\linklibs.rsp
